meaning: n.车体(尤指其细部构造,品质等)
examples: A second hand car dealer will always look at the bodywork rather than the engine.
There's a lot of bodywork involved to balance the kind of uniting the body, mind, and spirit.
The car's bodywork scarcely holds together.
There are also acupuncture, acupressure, biofeedback, Alexander, Reiki, Feldenkrais and other bodywork and postural techniques.
Before wiping down the bodywork, however, pay attention to the water beads that form on the surface.
